players.name: L. Malagón
players.ai_rationale: As Mexico's GK, Malagón needs to be on top of his game against South Africa. A 75% save rate and a clean sheet are tough but achievable for a top keeper.

players.name: J. Sánchez
players.ai_rationale: J. Sánchez is a solid defender for Mexico, so we're looking for his usual gritty performance. Expect him to be involved in plenty of defensive duels and keep the ball moving.

players.name: E. López
players.ai_rationale: E. López is a young defender for Mexico, and getting him significant minutes is key for his development. A full 90 minutes against South Africa will be a great test.

players.name: C. Montes
players.ai_rationale: C. Montes is a key defender for Mexico. We expect him to lead the line and shut down the South African attack for a clean sheet.

players.name: K. Álvarez
players.ai_rationale: K. Álvarez is a reliable defender for Mexico. We're looking for him to be dominant in the air and clear his lines effectively against South Africa.

players.name: Iker Jareth Fimbres Ochoa
players.ai_rationale: Iker Fimbres Ochoa is a creative spark for Mexico's midfield. We want to see him unlocking the South African defense with dangerous passes.

players.name: F. Ambríz
players.ai_rationale: F. Ambríz is a workhorse in the Mexican midfield. We expect him to cover a lot of ground, win tackles, and keep possession ticking with high accuracy.

players.name: É. Lira
players.ai_rationale: É. Lira is another engine for Mexico's midfield. His job is to disrupt the opposition and maintain control of the ball, hence the high tackle and pass accuracy target.

players.name: R. Jiménez
players.ai_rationale: R. Jiménez is a star striker for Mexico. He's expected to be the difference-maker, so we're looking for him to directly contribute to a goal.

players.name: A. González
players.ai_rationale: A. González is a dynamic forward for Mexico. We want to see him testing the South African keeper with multiple shots on goal.

players.name: D. Lainez
players.ai_rationale: D. Lainez has the flair to unlock defenses for Mexico. We're targeting key passes to see him creating chances for his teammates.

players.name: R. Williams
players.ai_rationale: R. Williams is South Africa's last line of defense. Facing Mexico's attack, he'll need to be stellar, hence the high save percentage and clean sheet requirement.

players.name: T. Matuludi
players.ai_rationale: T. Matuludi is a defender for South Africa. We expect him to be strong defensively against Mexico's forwards and clear any danger.

players.name: K. Ndamase
players.ai_rationale: K. Ndamase is a young defender for South Africa. We want to see him showing his defensive grit with tackles while keeping possession solid.

players.name: A. Modiba
players.ai_rationale: A. Modiba is a veteran defender for South Africa. Shutting down Mexico's attack and securing a clean sheet is a big ask, but a crucial one for him.

players.name: M. Mbokazi
players.ai_rationale: M. Mbokazi is a young defender for South Africa. Getting him a full 90 minutes against a strong Mexican side will be a massive learning experience.

players.name: T. Mokoena
players.ai_rationale: T. Mokoena is a key midfielder for South Africa. We expect him to dictate play and create scoring opportunities against Mexico.

players.name: T. Mbatha
players.ai_rationale: T. Mbatha is a workhorse in South Africa's midfield. He needs to be all over the pitch, breaking up play and keeping the ball moving efficiently.

players.name: T. Moremi
players.ai_rationale: T. Moremi is another vital player in South Africa's midfield engine room. His job is to be defensively sound and precise with his passing against Mexico.

players.name: O. Appollis
players.ai_rationale: O. Appollis is a star attacker for South Africa. He's the main threat, so we're looking for him to directly impact the scoreline against Mexico.

players.name: L. Foster
players.ai_rationale: L. Foster is a dangerous forward for South Africa. He needs to be getting shots off and forcing the Mexican keeper into action.

players.name: R. Mofokeng
players.ai_rationale: R. Mofokeng is a tricky winger for South Africa. We want him to use his dribbling to create chances and find teammates in dangerous positions.
